fundraiserunsubscribe-desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa isticmaalayaasha inay maamulaan xubinnimadooda liisaska iimaylka ee ururinta deeqaha ee la habeeyay
fundraiserunsubscribe-query: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad iska baxdo '''''$1''''?
fundraiserunsubscribe-info: Tani waxay kaa saaraysaa iimaylada Wikimedia Foundation ee laguugu soo diro adigoo deeq bixiye ah. Weli waxaa laga yaabaa inaad hesho iimaylo loo diro cinwaankan haddii uu ku xiran yahay akoon ka mid ah mashaariicdeena. Haddii aad wax su’aalo ah qabto, fadlan la xiriir [mailto:$1 $1].
fundraiserunsubscribe-errormsg: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayayay in la farsameeyo codsigaaga. Fadlan la xiriir [mailto:$1 $1].
fundraiserunsubscribe-success: Si guul leh ayaa lagaa saaray liiska iimaylka.
fundraiserunsubscribe-sucesswarning: Fadlan ogow in isbeddellada ay qaadan karaan ilaa afar (4) maalmood si ay u hirgalaan. Waan ka raalli nahay iimaylasha aad heli karto inta lagu jiro waqtigan. Haddii aad wax su’aalo ah qabto, fadlan la xiriir [mailto:$1 $1].
fundraisersubscribe-fail: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayayay in la farsameeyo codsigaaga. Fadlan la xiriir [mailto:$1 $1].
fundraisersubscribe-opt-in-continue-001: Haa, waan oggolaanayaa in la igu daro
fundraisersubscribe-page-subtitle-001: Soo hel siraha dunida dabiiciga ah ee laga helo Wikimedia Commons. Eeg 15-ka sawir ee ugu sarreeya ee 2018, oo ay qaadeen, wadaageen, isla markaana doorteen mutadawiciinta Wikimedia.
fundraisersubscribe-privacy-text-001: Iimayl kasta oo aad hesho wuxuu yeelan doonaa ikhtiyaar fudud oo aad iska bixi karto. Macluumaadkaaga waxaa loo maareeyaa si waafaqsan [$1 siyaasadda asturnaanta ee deeq bixiyeyaasha].
